summary: Iteration 9 (UI/logo-only) — verified all three logo instances (header, footer, login) render the new parrot logo image (/images/fagelregister-logo.png), naturalWidth>0, and each Link navigates to '/'. Footer copy is rebranded to 'Fågelregister' and 'info@fagelregister.se' (© 2026). Header dropdowns still work. Admin login + admin routes still functional. Frontend-only testing per request; backend tests skipped.

issues: Bottom-left legal line still reads '© 2026 Papegojregistret' — inconsistent with footer rebrand to Fågelregister (Login.jsx line 234). Right-panel caption still 'SVERIGES PAPEGOJREGISTER'.
Hero label-caps still 'SVERIGES PAPEGOJREGISTER' and hero heading still contains the word 'Papegojregistret'. Inconsistent with new Fågelregister brand shown in header/footer logo.
Admin left sidebar brand block still shows Feather icon + 'Papegojregistret' text. Not part of this iteration but noted for consistency.

action_items: (Optional / next iteration) Replace remaining 'Papegojregistret' text occurrences on Login page (© line + right-panel label-caps), Landing hero (SVERIGES PAPEGOJREGISTER label + 'Papegojregistret' heading), and Admin sidebar brand block to match the new Fågelregister brand introduced in header/footer.
(Optional) Consider also using the new logo image in the admin sidebar in place of the Feather icon for brand consistency.
critical_code_review_comments: PublicHeader/Footer/Login logo implementations look clean: single inside , correct data-testid, alt text, and hover transform. No hardcoded URLs.
Logo asset served correctly (200, content-type image/png, ~850KB). No broken image (naturalWidth=1254 in all three locations).

Text rebrand is inconsistent: only PublicFooter was rebranded to 'Fågelregister'. Login.jsx line 234, Login.jsx right-panel copy, Landing hero copy, and AdminLayout sidebar still say 'Papegojregistret'. If the product is now 'Fågelregister', main agent should propagate the rename in a follow-up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 logo swap verified end-to-end. If iteration 10 addresses the remaining 'Papegojregistret' → 'Fågelregister' text rename, verify: Login.jsx footer copyright line, Login.jsx right-image caption, Landing hero label & heading, AdminLayout sidebar brand. Header dropdown selector pattern: '[data-testid^="nav-dropdown-"]' returns 6 items (3 desktop + 3 mobile duplicates); filter by is_visible() when interacting.
verified_flows: Header logo (data-testid='nav-logo') on Landing renders img with naturalWidth=1254
Footer logo (data-testid='footer-logo') on Landing renders img h=96px, naturalWidth=1254
Footer logo also present on /registrera-fagel; clicking it navigates to /
Login logo (data-testid='login-logo') on /login has href='/' and clicking navigates to /
Header 'Registrera' dropdown opens with 2 children (Registrera fågel, Om ringnummer)
Admin login (admin@papegojregistret.se) still works, /admin dashboard renders
